member.name: T:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration
member.summary: Describes how a datetime is meant by a system. Two of these configurations allow to convert a datetime smoothly.

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.IsEndDate
member.summary: true if the the datetime describes an "end date", e.g. a contract end date

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.Resolution
member.summary: The smallest representable time unit in this system's end-date field. Must be set if and only if is . Adding one resolution unit to an inclusive end yields the equivalent exclusive end. Typical values: TimeSpan.FromDays(1), TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1), TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(1). Must be positive (greater than TimeSpan.Zero).

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.IsGas
member.summary: true iff the datetime describes a datetime in Sparte Gas
member.remarks: Please note that this is independent from the information whether the datetime is actually ! There are systems that discriminate Gas and non-Gas (this is what this flag is for) but are still unaware of the German Gas-Tag.

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.IsGasTagAware
member.summary: true iff is true and the date time is aware of the German "Gas-Tag" (meaning that start dates are 6:00 German local time and end dates are 06:00 German local time (if the end date is meant exclusive))

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.StripTime
member.summary: Set true to remove all hours, minutes, seconds, milliseconds from the respective DateTime. If set in the the hours, minutes... will be stripped _before_ the conversion. If set in the the hours, minutes... will be stripped _after_ the conversion.

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConfiguration.IsValid
member.summary: true iff the configuration is valid (self-consistent).
member.remarks: This basically checks if the nullable properties are not null under certain requirements

member.name: T:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration
member.summary: A date time conversion configuration describes which steps are necessary to convert a datetime from a source to a target

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration.Source
member.summary: The configuration of the datetime before the conversion

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration.Target
member.summary: The configuration of the datetime before the conversion

member.name: P:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration.IsValid
member.summary: true iff the configuration is valid

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration.GetInverted
member.summary: returns a new configuration that has switched and

member.name: T:MaKoDateTimeConverter.EndDateTimeKind
member.summary: Describes how an end datetime shall be understood

member.name: F:MaKoDateTimeConverter.EndDateTimeKind.Inclusive
member.summary: The end date shall be understood as inclusive end date

member.name: F:MaKoDateTimeConverter.EndDateTimeKind.Exclusive
member.summary: The end date shall be understood as exclusive end date

member.name: T:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter
member.summary: a converter that takes a datetime and converts it to another datetime, according to its configuration

member.name: F:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.BerlinTimeSerialized
member.summary: the Berlin time zone as serialized string

member.name: F:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.BerlinTime
member.summary: the timezone in Germany

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.#cctor
member.summary: a static constructor to initialize

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.IsGermanMidnight(System.DateTime)
member.summary: check if this is the begin of a German stromtag
member.returns: returns true iff the given datetime is midnight in Germany

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.Convert6AamToMidnight(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a German 6AM to German midnight of the same German day
member.exception: if the input is not utc or not 6am

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.ConvertMidnightTo6Am(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a German midnight to 6Am of the same German day
member.exception: if the input is not utc or not midnight

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.AddGermanDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Adds 1 German day
member.exception: if the input is not utc

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.SubtractGermanDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Subtracts 1 German day
member.exception: if the input is not utc

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.StripTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: remove all hours, minutes, seconds, milliseconds (in german local time) from the given . This is similar to a "round down" or "floor" in German local time.

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.IsGerman6Am(System.DateTime)
member.summary: check if this is the begin of a German Gastag
member.returns: returns true iff the given datetime is 06:00am in Germany

member.name: M:MaKoDateTimeConverter.MaKoDateTimeConverter.Convert(System.DateTime,MaKoDateTimeConverter.DateTimeConversionConfiguration)
member.summary: converts the given to a target by applying all transformations which are derived from the given where is described by
member.param: the source date time (input value of the conversion)
describes the steps necessary to convert the given
